validation_steps.detail: problem.original_prompt round-trips to the exact 1378 prompt.md bytes; JSON escaping only.
Three Tracks, six unique Loops, multi-parent synthesis, scorer/criterion/track/parent/milestone/champion/evidence references are coherent.
Every artifact path is relative to generated/ and contains neither a generated/ prefix nor a backslash/absolute prefix.
All 44 referenced artifacts exist beneath generated/.
All 44 referenced artifact SHA-256 values match file bytes.
Intentionally deferred to the orchestrator as requested; Viewer and gate were not run during manifest assembly.
